subcodes.first_line: The letter of your esteemed self arrived, and its details were noted. Indeed, it is as stated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب رسید و بر تفاصیل آگاهی حاصل شد فی الحقیقه چنین است که مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @status of kings; future of monarchy
